## Type of Change

<!-- Check one that applies -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested this change -->

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Tested manually in the example app
- [ ] Tested in multiple browsers/environments

## Checklist

<!-- Review these before submitting -->

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Code is properly formatted (`pnpm format`)
- [ ] Self-review of my code completed
- [ ] Commented complex code sections
- [ ] Updated documentation (if needed)
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Added changeset (if this affects the public API: `pnpm changeset`)
